category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Namibia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入纳米比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入納米比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Namibia NSI conformity expectations, ECB electricity-sector regulation, NamPower and RED grid-connection approval, IEC 61851 safety and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, high-temperature derating, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与纳米比亚NSI合格评定预期、ECB电力行业监管、NamPower及RED并网接入审批、IEC 61851安全和IEC 61000 EMC证据、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、高温降额，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與納米比亞NSI合格評定預期、ECB電力行業監管、NamPower及RED併網接入審批、IEC 61851安全和IEC 61000 EMC證據、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、高溫降額，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Namibia, the practical gaps are not a confirmed single national EVSE type-approval rule, but a project-specific chain: NSI standards and conformity treatment where Namibian standards adopt or reference IEC standards, ECB electricity-sector licensing or regulatory treatment where the charging project affects generation, supply, distribution, resale, or network operation, and NamPower or the relevant Regional Electricity Distributor connection approval before energisation. Namibia's low-voltage context is commonly treated as 220/380 V, 50 Hz, so China 220/380 V hardware may fit nominal voltage, but protection settings, power quality, metering, load management, site wiring, and high-temperature derating still require Namibian project validation. Namibia sits in the Southern Africa IEC connector ecosystem: Type 2 is the expected AC connector and CCS2 the expected DC connector where specified. GB/T 20234 connector chargers are physically incompatible and need hardware redesign to IEC 62196; GB/T 27930 DC communication is not a CCS2/OCPP substitute. The EV market is nascent, long driving distances and strong solar resources make solar-charging attractive, and exporters should verify the exact NSI, ECB, NamPower/RED, importer, and site-owner route before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入纳米比亚时，实际差距并非已确认的单一全国EVSE整机型式批准规则，而是项目专属链条：在纳米比亚标准采纳或引用IEC标准时满足NSI标准及合格评定处理；当充电项目涉及发电、供电、配电、转售或网络运营时确认ECB电力行业许可或监管处理；并在通电前取得NamPower或相关区域配电商接入批准。纳米比亚低压电网通常按220/380 V、50 Hz处理，因此中国220/380 V硬件在额定电压上可能匹配，但保护设置、电能质量、计量、负载管理、现场布线和高温降额仍须按纳米比亚项目验证。纳米比亚处于南部非洲IEC接口体系中：在项目规定时，交流通常预期为Type 2，直流通常预期为CCS2。GB/T 20234接口充电桩在物理上不兼容，需改为IEC 62196硬件；GB/T 27930直流通信也不能替代CCS2/OCPP。纳米比亚EV市场仍处早期，长距离出行和强太阳能资源使太阳能充电具备吸引力；出口商应在出货前核实具体NSI、ECB、NamPower/RED、进口商及场地方路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入納米比亞時，實際差距並非已確認的單一全國EVSE整機型式批准規則，而是項目專屬鏈條：在納米比亞標準採納或引用IEC標準時滿足NSI標準及合格評定處理；當充電項目涉及發電、供電、配電、轉售或網絡運營時確認ECB電力行業許可或監管處理；並在通電前取得NamPower或相關區域配電商接入批准。納米比亞低壓電網通常按220/380 V、50 Hz處理，因此中國220/380 V硬件在額定電壓上可能匹配，但保護設置、電能質量、計量、負載管理、現場佈線和高溫降額仍須按納米比亞項目驗證。納米比亞處於南部非洲IEC接口體系中：在項目規定時，交流通常預期為Type 2，直流通常預期為CCS2。GB/T 20234接口充電樁在物理上不兼容，需改為IEC 62196硬件；GB/T 27930直流通訊也不能替代CCS2/OCPP。納米比亞EV市場仍處早期，長距離出行和強太陽能資源使太陽能充電具備吸引力；出口商應在出貨前核實具體NSI、ECB、NamPower/RED、進口商及場地方路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NSI conformity determination, ECB licence decision, NamPower or RED connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, site owners, and installers should verify current Namibia standards, regulated-product scope, ECB requirements, NamPower or RED connection rules, IEC standard editions, and site installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NSI合格评定裁定、ECB许可决定、NamPower或RED接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商、场地方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行纳米比亚标准、受监管产品范围、ECB要求、NamPower或RED接入规则、IEC标准版本及现场安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NSI合格評定裁定、ECB許可決定、NamPower或RED接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商、場地方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行納米比亞標準、受監管產品範圍、ECB要求、NamPower或RED接入規則、IEC標準版本及現場安裝要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
